COIDA registration

Register as an employer with the Compensation Fund (Workmen’s Compensation).

By assessment — no payment now Typical turnaround: Confirmed once we’ve assessed your request
More about this service ▾

COIDA (Workmen’s Compensation) registration is handled case by case. Before we take it on we first confirm whether we’re able to assist with your particular industry and circumstances — so this is a request, not an instant purchase, and no payment is taken now. Once we’ve reviewed your details we’ll confirm whether we can help and send you a quote.

Please give as much detail as possible — the nature of your business determines the assessment class and tariff (rate) applied to your COIDA assessment.

Director1

Director2

Director3

Director4

Director5

No payment is taken now. We’ll review your request, confirm whether we can assist, and send you a quote.
